strengths: 15+ years of full-stack engineering across web, mobile, desktop and embedded systems, comfortably exceeding the 6+ year bar
Direct hands-on experience with the primary stack: TypeScript, Node.js, React, and MongoDB across Optilyz, RIDE Capital, and re:cinq
Current role at re:cinq explicitly involves AI-agent infrastructure, MCP code generators, and agentic workflow frameworks — matching the AI agent development requirement
concerns: Resume does not explicitly name Nest.js or Vitest, though Node.js/TypeScript/testing background transfers naturally
Kotlin is not listed in skills, though Java experience is present from National Instruments and Altom robotics work
Cloud experience is shown via AWS CDK at Optilyz and Kubernetes for GISCollective, but breadth across GCP/Azure is not detailed

key_factors.factor: Active AI-agent and MCP tooling work at re:cinq
Software craftsmanship discipline (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based, testing workshops)

response.justification: Bogdan brings well over a decade of full-stack delivery directly aligned with the primary stack — TypeScript, Node.js, React, and MongoDB — proven at Optilyz, RIDE Capital, and now re:cinq, where he is already building AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators that map cleanly onto the role's AI agent requirement. His track record spans high-throughput backend systems at Dunnhumby, pricing platforms on AWS CDK, Kubernetes-deployed GIS platforms, and Java-based robotics work, demonstrating the polyglot, architectural, and cloud/containerization breadth the role asks for. Layered on top is a deep software-craftsmanship culture — TDD, pairing, CI/CD, public workshops on testing and web internals, and his own open-source testing libraries — making him a strong fit for an internal automation tooling team that values reliability, clean code, and customer-oriented delivery.
